name: sdd-plugins
description: Three-stage specification, implementation, and quality plugins.

metadata.description: Prepare approved specifications, implement one task, then independently verify it.

plugins.name: sdd-ship
plugins.description: Implement approved SDD tasks through the quality gate to Done — the second of the two-command workflow.

plugins.name: sdd-implementation
plugins.description: [internal] Implement one approved task and prepare a quality-gate handoff. Use /sdd-ship:run for the standard workflow.

plugins.name: sdd-quality-loop
plugins.description: Independently verify implementations and resolve review tickets.

plugins.name: sdd-lite
plugins.description: [internal] Lightweight medium-weight SDD track for internal/departmental apps. Use /sdd-ship:run --lite for the standard workflow.

plugins.name: sdd-review-loop
plugins.description: [internal] Independent implementation and task decomposition reviews used by sdd-bootstrap.
